name: Spacex
philosophy: An inspired interpretation of Spasex's design language — a mission-oriented aerospace brand built on pure black canvas, full-bleed photographic and video heroes of rockets and Mars landscapes, and uppercase D-DIN display type set in tight vertical leading.
trademark_signals: Single canvas: pure (#000000) for marketing; only on the shop site
Display tier in uppercase D-DIN-Bold with positive horizontal tracking (1.6px at 80px) — the brand's typographic signature
Full-bleed photography or autoplaying video as the dominant decorative element; type sits directly on imagery with no scrim
Single ghost-outlined pill CTA per band, at 32px radius — never filled, never accent-colored
All-caps eyebrow microtext ( and ) with positive 0.96–1.17px tracking — every chrome element shouts in caps
ai_slop_avoided: introduce brand accent colors — black, white, and photography are the entire palette
use drop shadows or gradient overlays on dark canvas — they fight the photography
render display tiers in sentence-case or title-case — uppercase is the brand
